name: timeAgo
description: Returns a human-readable relative time string (e.g. '2m ago', '1h ago', 'just now') from a Date or ISO string

name: formatTime
description: Formats a Date/string to HH:MM in 24h format, returns '—' for null/undefined

name: formatDuration
description: Converts minutes to human-readable duration string like '1h 25m' or '45m'

name: formatDMS
description: Converts decimal lat/lon to DMS notation like '40°38'29"N 73°46'41"W'

name: formatAltitude
description: Formats altitude in feet with thousands separator: '38,000 ft'

name: formatSpeed
description: Formats ground speed in knots: '520 kt'

name: formatDelay
description: Formats delay minutes as '+25 min', 'On Time' (0), or '-5 min' (early)

name: flightStatusVariant
description: Maps flight status string to a badge variant. EN_ROUTE→nominal, BOARDING→blue, DELAYED/DIVERTED→warning, CANCELLED→critical, LANDED→neutral

name: alertSeverityVariant
description: Maps alert severity (CRITICAL/WARNING/INFO) to badge variant

name: subwayStatusVariant
description: Maps MTA subway status to badge variant. GOOD_SERVICE→nominal, DELAYS→warning, PLANNED_WORK→info, SUSPENDED→critical, SERVICE_CHANGE→warning

name: bikeStationStatus
description: Derives bike station status from availability and operational flags. Returns 'offline', 'empty', 'low', or 'available'

name: bikeStationVariant
description: Maps bike station status string to badge variant

name: watchlistTypeVariant
description: Maps watchlist item type (FLIGHT/BIKE_STATION/SUBWAY_LINE/AIRPORT) to badge variant

name: subwayLineTextColor
description: Returns a CSS variable string for subway line status text color (e.g. 'var(--status-critical)' for SUSPENDED)

name: bikeAvailabilityPercent
description: Calculates bike availability as percentage of capacity. Returns 0 if capacity is 0. Clamped to [0, 100].

name: flightProgressPercent
description: Estimates flight progress (0-100) based on current position relative to origin and destination using Euclidean distance. Clamped to [0, 100].

name: haversineKm
description: Calculates great-circle distance in kilometers between two lat/lon coordinates using the Haversine formula

name: latLonToString
description: Formats lat/lon as '40.6413°N, 73.7781°W' with N/S/E/W suffixes

name: StatCard
description: Metric display card with large number, label, optional unit, and optional amber left accent border. Used in Command Center dashboard.

parameters.name: props
parameters.type: { label: string; value: string | number; unit?: string; variant?: 'amber' | 'red' | 'green' | 'blue' | 'default'; accentLeft?: boolean }

name: PanelHeader
description: Section header with monospace all-caps title, optional subtitle, and optional right-aligned actions slot

parameters.name: props
parameters.type: { title: string; subtitle?: string; actions?: React.ReactNode }

name: FlightTableRow
description: Single flight row: callsign (monospace amber), airline, route (ORIGIN→DEST), status badge, altitude and speed in monospace

name: FlightTable
description: Full flight table with column headers and FlightTableRow for each flight. Shows empty state message when no flights.

parameters.name: props
parameters.type: { flights: Flight[]; showRoute?: boolean; emptyMessage?: string }

name: SubwayLineBadge
description: Colored circular badge with the MTA line letter/number inside. Sizes: sm=20px, md=28px, lg=36px.

name: SubwayLineCard
description: Card for a single MTA subway line: colored badge, name, status badge, status text. Red background when SUSPENDED.

name: BikeStationCard
description: Compact station card with name, availability bar (filled to bikeAvailabilityPercent), bikes/docks counts, and status badge

name: EmptyState
description: Centered empty state with optional icon, title, description, and action slot. Used in watchlist and other list views.

parameters.name: props
parameters.type: { icon?: React.ReactNode; title: string; description?: string; action?: React.ReactNode }

name: WatchlistItemCard
description: Watchlist item card showing type badge, label, refId in monospace, notes, and delete button

name: AlertPanel
description: Panel listing alerts with severity badge, title, truncated body, time ago, and read indicator

name: DataRow
description: Labeled data row with label on left (muted, small) and value on right. Optional monospace font and highlight color for the value.

parameters.name: props
parameters.type: { label: string; value: string | number; mono?: boolean; highlight?: string }

name: RouteProgressArc
description: SVG arc visualization showing a flight route from origin to destination with a plane icon positioned at the progress percentage

parameters.name: props
parameters.type: { origin: Airport; destination: Airport; current: { lat: number; lon: number }; progress: number }

name: useClock
description: Returns current UTC time as 'HH:MM:SSZ' string, updates every second via setInterval

name: useAlertCount
description: Fetches /api/alerts and returns { unreadCount, loading }

name: useFlights
description: Fetches /api/flights and returns { flights, loading, error }. Exports the Flight type.
returnType: { flights: Flight[]; loading: boolean; error: string | null }

name: useBikeStations
description: Fetches /api/bikes and returns { stations, summary, loading, error }
returnType: { stations: BikeStation[]; summary: BikeSummary; loading: boolean; error: string | null }

name: useWatchlist
description: Fetches /api/watchlist, provides deleteItem(id) function. Returns { items, loading, error, deleteItem }.
returnType: { items: WatchlistItem[]; loading: boolean; error: string | null; deleteItem: (id: number) => Promise<void> }

name: useAlerts
description: Fetches /api/alerts and returns { alerts, unreadCount, loading, error }
returnType: { alerts: Alert[]; unreadCount: number; loading: boolean; error: string | null }

name: CommandCenter
description: Main dashboard showing live flight activity, system alerts, subway status, bike hotspots and watchlist preview

name: AirTrafficPage
description: Interactive Leaflet map with all active aircraft positions, filterable flight list

name: CityBikesPage
description: Citi Bike NYC station map and list with real-time availability

name: SubwayPage
description: NYC MTA subway line status grid and active train positions

name: FlightDetailPage
description: Single flight detail: route arc, live telemetry, delay info, alerts

name: AirportHubPage
description: Airport departures and arrivals board for a given IATA code

name: WatchlistPage
description: User watchlist showing tracked flights, bike stations, subway lines, and airports with alerts

name: mergeGbfsFeeds
description: Merges GBFS station_information and station_status feeds into a unified MergedStation shape. Excludes status entries with no matching info.

name: isDataStale
description: Returns true if lastUpdated is null or older than intervalMs. Used to decide whether to re-sync from GBFS.

name: computeBikesSummary
description: Aggregates bike station stats: total bikes, docks, low-inventory stations, and empty-but-renting stations.

parameters.name: stations
parameters.type: { bikesAvailable: number; docksAvailable: number; isRenting: boolean }[]

name: getBikeStationStatus
description: Derives the operational status label for a bike station: OFFLINE, NOT RENTING, or OPERATIONAL.

name: extractOpenSkyCallsign
description: Extracts and normalizes a callsign from an OpenSky state vector: trims whitespace and uppercases. Returns empty string for missing/blank callsigns.

name: isValidAirborneState
description: Returns true for an OpenSky state vector that is airborne (not on ground), has a known position, and matches a callsign in the provided set.

name: metersToFeet
description: Converts meters to feet (aviation standard). Returns 0 for null/zero input.

name: msToKnots
description: Converts meters-per-second to knots (aviation standard). Returns 0 for null/zero input.

name: openSkyStateToFlightUpdate
description: Maps a validated OpenSky state vector to a FlightPositionUpdate record ready for DB upsert. Converts units (m→ft, m/s→knots).

name: DarkTileLayer
description: Shared Carto Dark Matter tile layer for Leaflet maps, served via the /api/tiles proxy. Reused by FlightMap and BikeMap.

name: FlightMarker
description: Leaflet marker for a single in-flight aircraft: amber plane icon (rotated by heading), dark popup with callsign/telemetry, and optional dashed route polyline.

name: BikeStationMarker
description: Leaflet circle marker for a Citi Bike station: color-coded by availability (green/amber/red/gray), dark popup with name, counts, and operational status.

name: getMarkerColor
description: Returns the hex color for a bike station marker based on availability percentage. Green >20%, amber 10-20%, red ≤10%, gray if offline/not renting.

parameters.name: station
parameters.type: { isInstalled: boolean; isRenting: boolean; capacity: number; bikesAvailable: number }

name: getMarkerGlowColor
description: Returns a CSS rgba glow color string matching a bike marker hex color for use in drop-shadow filters.

name: getMarkerSize
description: Returns the pixel size for a bike marker icon based on map zoom level. 14px at z≤13, 20px at z14-15, 26px at z≥16.

name: BikeStationPopup
description: Renders the popup content for a bike station marker — station name, bikes/docks available, capacity, and operational status.
